title: Compilation error on Centos7
body:
Hi,

I'm evaluating a new compute cluster that runs Centos7 and although I've seen posts that say Verilator doesn't support Centos7, I've not seen this particular error anywhere.

I'm using GCC 9.2.0 but the binutils version installed on the system is 2.27.  I'm getting an assembler error when I'm compiling:

```
make[2]: Entering directory `/evprj029/projects/common/tools/verilator/verilator-git/src/obj_dbg'
      Compile flags:  g++ -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/projects/common/tools/verilator/verilator-v4.228/share/verilator"
ccache g++   -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/projects/common/tools/verilator/verilator-v4.228/share/verilator\" -c ../Verilator.cpp -o Verilator.o
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s: Assembler messages:
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:16: Error: unknown .loc sub-directive `view'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:16: Error: junk at end of line, first unrecognized character is `-'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:18: Error: unknown .loc sub-directive `view'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:18: Error: unknown pseudo-op: `.lvu1'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:19: Error: unknown .loc sub-directive `view'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:19: Error: unknown pseudo-op: `.lvu2'
/tmp/325571.1.q/ccAYOaMp.s:36: Error: unknown .loc sub-directive `view'
```

Any idea where the issue is here?  An out of date binutils or something Centos specific?

Shareef.
